title: Aspirin and Neuroinflammation
abstract: Aspirin has demonstrated anti-inflammatory effects in neurodegenerative disorders by reducing cytokine activity and oxidative stress.

title: Ibuprofen Mechanisms
abstract: Ibuprofen inhibits COX enzymes and reduces inflammatory signaling pathways associated with chronic pain.

title: Microglia Activation in Alzheimer's
abstract: Activated microglia contribute significantly to neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's disease progression.
